app.title: Transunformers
app.tagline: Explore Transformer architectures as a living model catalog.

overview.title: Understand the catalog before you dive into a single architecture.
overview.description: Overview turns the parsed index into a fast operational summary: model families, mapping coverage, parameter scale, and the architectures worth opening next.
overview.quickFocusDescription: Click a family or mapping row to narrow the explorer and graph around that slice of the catalog.
overview.metricVisibleModelsDetail: {{count}} total indexed entries in the local catalog.
overview.metricVisibleParametersDetail: Aggregate parameter count across the filtered model set.
overview.metricParseSuccessDetail: {{count}} modules on average per visible model.
overview.spotlightTitle: Heavy hitters in the current slice
overview.spotlightEmpty: No models match the current filters.
overview.usageBody: Start from the catalog overview to identify scale, coverage, and unusual clusters. Move into graph view when you want structural drill-down, then use the layers table for searchable quantitative inspection.
overview.usageStep1: 1. Use the overview to compare families, mappings, and model scale.
overview.usageStep2: 2. Jump into graph view for structural motifs and branching patterns.
overview.usageStep3: 3. Switch to layers view when you need sortable module-level evidence.

workspace.empty: Choose a model from the left to inspect its structure.

layers.empty: Select a model from the sidebar to inspect its layers.
layers.emptyFiltered: No layers found matching your filter.

settings.title: Settings
settings.themeDescription: Switch between light and dark themes.
settings.footer: Built for navigating large model structure catalogs.
